name: Erie County Employees
description_short: Erie County Employees Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering savings accounts, checking, loans, and online banking services to eligible members in Buffalo, NY.
description_long:
Erie County Employees Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union based in Buffalo, New York, serving members with a physical branch at 95 Franklin Street. The organization functions as a member-owned cooperative financial institution with NCUA insurance protection on deposit accounts. The credit union maintains limited office hours (Monday-Friday, 8:30am-3:00pm) and observes a comprehensive holiday schedule.

The credit union offers a range of deposit products including Regular Share (savings) accounts, Share Draft (checking) accounts, Christmas Club savings accounts, Fun Club accounts, and Share Certificates (CDs). Loan services include auto loans with promotional rates as low as 4.99% for new vehicles and 5.75% for used vehicles. Digital services include online home banking, mobile deposit capability via their mobile app, and Visa debit cards. Members can access funds through ATM locations at 95 Franklin Street and 92 Franklin Street in Buffalo.

The credit union distinguishes itself through membership-based ownership structure, competitive loan rates, and a focus on member service. The organization emphasizes personalized lending using credit-based programs and offers member-exclusive products like the Fun Club and Christmas Club savings accounts. Their free Share Draft checking account includes 40 free checks, no monthly fees, and no minimum balance requirements.

As a credit union, membership eligibility appears restricted to Erie County employees or related groups (references to AFSCME and NYSNA in holiday schedule suggest employer-based membership). The organization's limited physical presence (one branch location) and restricted office hours may limit accessibility for some consumers. The website provides limited detail on membership requirements, loan approval processes, or specific rates beyond promotional auto loan offers. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Regular Share (savings) accounts with competitive dividend rates
Share Draft (checking) accounts with no monthly fees
Christmas Club savings accounts with automatic November transfers
Fun Club savings accounts for summer spending (July 1 - June 30)
Share Certificates (CDs) with variable rates and terms
Auto loans with rates as low as 4.99% (new) and 5.75% (used)
Online home banking platform for account management
Mobile deposit functionality via mobile application
Direct deposit and payroll deduction services
ATM access at two Buffalo locations
General loan services tailored to member needs
pros: Free Share Draft checking with no monthly fees, no minimum balance, and 40 free checks included
Competitive auto loan rates as low as 4.99% for new vehicles and 5.75% for used vehicles
NCUA-insured deposit accounts providing federal protection on savings
Mobile deposit capability allowing members to deposit checks via mobile app
Multiple savings account options including Christmas Club and Fun Club accounts with automatic transfers
Unlimited check writing with no per-check fees on Share Draft accounts
Two ATM locations for account access in Buffalo
Member-owned cooperative structure aligning institution incentives with member interests
cons: Limited physical accessibility with only one branch location in Buffalo, NY
Restricted office hours (8:30am-3:00pm weekdays only) with no weekend availability
Membership appears restricted to Erie County employees or specific employer groups, limiting eligibility
Website provides limited transparency on specific membership requirements and qualification criteria
No mention of 24/7 customer service or phone support outside office hours
best_for: Erie County government employees and affiliated public sector workers
Individuals seeking membership-based banking with competitive loan rates
Members prioritizing free checking accounts with no monthly maintenance fees
Borrowers shopping for auto loans in the Buffalo, NY area
diagnosis: Erie County Employees Credit Union is best for government employees and union members in the Buffalo area seeking free, no-fee checking accounts and competitive auto loan rates within a member-owned cooperative structure. The primary limitation is restricted membership eligibility—this institution is not open to the general public and serves only specific employer groups, making it inaccessible to most consumers regardless of location.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Erie County Employees Credit Union in Buffalo, NY offers savings accounts, checking, loans, and online banking.
